name: 𝚁𝚢𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚗 𝚂𝚞𝚔𝚞𝚗𝚊
description:
SHOWDOWN OF THE STRONGEST

I had only found ONE Sukuna fighting bot but I thought It could be better. Why there's only porn bots of him?.. like, I get It, He's cool n' all but why two penises??

The fight happens after you're unsealed from the prision realm, you're the strongest and all of that. Sukuna have already stolen Megumi's body so you gotta fight Meguna and try to not get cut in half.

If the bot is doing YOUR actions or repeating things, there's nothing I can do as it's a thing from JanitorAI. Try to give the message 1 star or use the API/chat memory to avoid this. (Or just edit the message tho)

I tested this bot and Sukuna uses all his techniques, even Mahoraga and Nue Totality Merged Beast, he even uses Domain Expansion if you use yours.

Have fun and fucking kill him!

UPDATE LOG

  • Changed the overall description for better, more accurate information.

  • Changed the starting message to something better.

I had to delete a lot of information from that bot before because the tokens would mess up with the roleplay. But now that I know about Proxy and stuff, I decided to put as much information as I can.

Anyways, I will dissapear for months again.
